fonts.hint: Click a font to set it as the default. Download (⬇) or remove (🗑) fonts from the same list — same behaviour as the Subtitle Style dialog.

defaultStyle.hint: These values are applied to new transcriptions. The subtitle style dialog reflects the same settings — editing here or there updates both.

whisper.hint: Whisper engine parameters. The STEP 1 "Advanced" dialog edits the same fields — changes on either surface stay in sync.
